message:
fix(extensions,sse,providers,scheduler): improve lane dispatch fallback metadata, SSE error recovery ordering, and test correctness

Concurrent agent contributions across multiple modules:

extensions.rs:
- Enrich fallback lane-execution metadata when lane dispatch is missing:
  compute method/capability/capability_class from the decision fields and
  emit structured lane_reason instead of opaque "unknown" values
- Use "compat" lane when outcome_error_code is present (runtime risk path)

sse.rs:
- Fix event ordering in UTF-8 error recovery: pending events now drain
  before the error surfaces, matching SSE spec semantics
- test_stream_surfaces_pending_event_before_utf8_error: expect recovered
  empty-data event between valid event and error
- test_stream_resumes_parsing_remainder_after_utf8_error: reorder
  assertions to match corrected Ok(ok) → Ok(after) → Err(invalid) sequence

providers/cohere.rs:
- Fix extract_text_user_content test expectation to include image
  placeholder text "[Image: image/png (8 bytes)]" between text parts

scheduler.rs:
- Fix hugepage fallback_reasons assertion: expect "hugepage_disabled"
  string instead of null

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
